legacyReference.marker: git not found; cannot inspect tracked files.

retirementJustification.behavior: The guard only rejects double-quote characters inside the legacy-import-only orchestratorRules example; AO 0.10.2 worker policy is delivered from AGENTS.md and runtime side-process scripts do not consume this quoting constraint.
retirementJustification.replacement: No replacement gate is required; AGENTS.md delivery, executable side-process contracts, and their dedicated checks cover the live behavior.
